onboarding_subtitle: Your smart farming companion for weather alerts, crop advice, and government schemes.
no_actions: No action items right now. Weather looks good!
demo_mode: Demo Mode — Add API key for live data
error_location: Could not detect location. Please enter city manually.
ai_error: Could not load AI insights. Check internet connection.
voice_ask_placeholder: Ask about crops, weather, farming tips...
voice_not_supported: Voice not supported in this browser
crop_camera_error: Camera access denied or not available
crop_no_image: Please take or upload a photo first
crop_analysis_error: Could not analyze image. Try again.
adv_heatwave_desc: Temperature is {{temp}}°C. Use shade nets, water crops early morning/late evening.
adv_heat_stress_desc: Temperature {{temp}}°C — apply mulching and increase irrigation frequency.
adv_frost_desc: Temperature is {{temp}}°C. Cover crops with plastic sheets, use smoke pots near orchards.
adv_cold_stress_desc: Temperature {{temp}}°C — monitor tender crops, consider row covers.
adv_good_temp_desc: Temperature {{temp}}°C is ideal. Great time for field activities.
adv_fungal_high_desc: Humidity {{humidity}}% — spray preventive fungicide. Check leaves for spots.
adv_fungal_watch_desc: Humidity at {{humidity}}%. Monitor crops closely for signs of blight or mildew.
adv_irrigation_desc: Humidity is only {{humidity}}%. Soil may be dry — schedule irrigation.
adv_thunderstorm_desc: Thunderstorm in area. Stay indoors, secure equipment and livestock.
adv_rain_desc: Rainfall detected. Good for standing crops, postpone harvesting if possible.
adv_delay_spray_desc: Do not spray pesticides/fertilizers during rain — they will wash off.
adv_high_wind_desc: Wind speed {{wind_speed}} km/h. Secure shade nets, avoid spraying.
adv_wind_caution_desc: Wind at {{wind_speed}} km/h. Avoid pesticide spraying — drift risk.
adv_good_conditions_desc: Clear skies and pleasant weather. Ideal for sowing, weeding or harvesting.
